name: 🛡️ Vulnerability Management
description: Enterprise vulnerability identification, risk prioritization, remediation tracking, and security posture improvement across infrastructure, applications, and connected assets.

name: 🔎 Security Assessment & Penetration Testing
description: Performing infrastructure, network, application, and IoT security assessments using industry-standard methodologies and tools.

name: 🐍 Python Security Automation
description: Developing automation scripts and security tooling for vulnerability analysis, reporting, data processing, and operational efficiency.

name: 🧰 Security Tools
description: Hands-on experience with Nessus, Burp Suite, Nmap, Rapid7, ELK Stack, Wireshark, and security analysis utilities.

name: 🌐 Network & Protocol Security
description: Strong understanding of TCP/IP, HTTP/HTTPS, SSH, DNS, SNMP, and network communication security principles.

name: 💻 Linux & Windows Security
description: Security assessment, system analysis, configuration validation, and administration across Linux and Windows environments.

name: ☁️ Security Compliance & Governance
description: Experience with ISO 27001 internal audits, security controls validation, risk assessments, and compliance activities.

name: 🚨 Incident Response & Threat Management
description: Supporting security investigations, threat analysis, incident handling, and improving organizational cyber resilience.

name: ⚙️ Scripting & Automation
description: Automation using Python, Bash, and PowerShell to reduce manual effort and improve cybersecurity operations.
